title: PRIMA 3pc Stainless Steel Cookware Set 14,16,18cm
features: Essential 3-Piece Set: Includes three versatile saucepans in 14cm, 16cm, and 18cm sizes, perfect for a variety of cooking tasks from simmering to boiling.
High-Quality Stainless Steel: Made from premium stainless steel for superior durability, even heat distribution, and resistance to rust and corrosion.
Tempered Glass Lids: Each saucepan comes with a matching tempered glass lid featuring a steam vent for easy monitoring and preventing boil-overs.
Ergonomic Handles: Designed with heat-resistant, ergonomic handles for comfortable and secure handling, making cooking and serving effortless.
description: Discover the convenience and durability of the PRIMA 3pc Stainless Steel Cookware Set, featuring three essential saucepans in 14cm, 16cm, and 18cm sizes. This versatile set is perfect for a range of cooking tasks, from simmering sauces to boiling vegetables. Constructed from high-quality stainless steel, each piece in the set offers exceptional durability, even heat distribution, and resistance to rust and corrosion. The included tempered glass lids come with steam vents to prevent boil-overs and provide easy visibility of your cooking progress. The ergonomic, heat-resistant handles ensure comfortable and secure handling, making both cooking and serving a breeze. The smooth, non-porous surface of the stainless steel makes cleaning effortless, with the added convenience of dishwasher compatibility. Designed for use on all stovetops, including gas, electric, and induction, this cookware set is a practical and stylish addition to any kitchen. Elevate your cooking experience with the PRIMA 3pc Stainless Steel Cookware Set, combining durability, functionality, and ease of maintenance for your culinary needs.
